name: compliance_gating
description: a regulatory compliance-gating world that gates actions; actions request, check, approve, block

card.description: a regulatory compliance-gating world that gates actions; actions request, check, approve, block

rules: An action must be 'request'ed before it can be 'check'ed, approved, or blocked.
'check' compares the request's risk to the threshold and records the verdict (compliant if risk <= threshold).
'approve' opens the gate only for a request that has been checked AND found compliant; otherwise it is a no-op.
'block' closes the gate on any checked request and is the way to stop a violation.
The gate handles one request at a time; an action issued out of turn leaves the state unchanged.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action["name"] if isinstance(action, dict) else action
    s["audit"] = list(s.get("audit", []))

    def log(entry):
        s["audit"] = (s["audit"] + [entry])[-8:]

    phase = s.get("phase", "idle")

    if name == "request":
        # Open a new request only when the gate is free.
        if phase != "idle":
            return s
        n = s.get("requested", 0) + 1
        risk = (n * 37) % 100          # deterministic, varied risk per request
        s["requested"] = n
        s["current_risk"] = risk
        s["phase"] = "requested"
        s["checked"] = False
        s["compliant"] = False
        log("request #%d risk=%d" % (n, risk))
        return s

    if name == "check":
        # Evaluate the pending request against the compliance threshold.
        if phase != "requested":
            return s
        compliant = s.get("current_risk", 0) <= s.get("threshold", 50)
        s["compliant"] = bool(compliant)
        s["checked"] = True
        s["phase"] = "checked"
        log("check risk=%d threshold=%d -> %s"
            % (s.get("current_risk", 0), s.get("threshold", 50),
               "compliant" if compliant else "violation"))
        return s

    if name == "approve":
        # The gate only opens for a checked, compliant request.
        if phase != "checked" or not s.get("compliant", False):
            return s
        s["approved"] = s.get("approved", 0) + 1
        s["phase"] = "idle"
        s["checked"] = False
        s["current_risk"] = 0
        log("approved (total=%d)" % s["approved"])
        return s

    if name == "block":
        # Close the gate on any checked request (compliant or not).
        if phase != "checked":
            return s
        s["blocked"] = s.get("blocked", 0) + 1
        s["phase"] = "idle"
        s["checked"] = False
        s["current_risk"] = 0
        log("blocked (total=%d)" % s["blocked"])
        return s

    return s

emit.report: Compliance gate [{phase}] | requested={requested} approved={approved} blocked={blocked} last_verdict={compliant}
